headings.usage: Large, bold headers for easy scanning in poor warehouse lighting.

body.usage: Highly legible body text, excellent for order numbers, quantities, and bilingual Hindi/English text.

visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E4E4E7 on all cards, inputs, and list items. Avoid soft muddy shadows.
visual enhancers.shapes: Slightly rounded corners (rounded-md) for inputs, sharp edges for full-width lists.
visual enhancers.icons: Use lucide-react-native. Bold, recognizable outlines with sufficient size (min 24px).

component name.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded large buttons. Minimum touch target height 48px.
component name.cards: Flat solid background with 1px border. High contrast data pairs (Label: gray text-sm, Value: black bold text-lg).
component name.inputs: Large touch areas (min 48px height), clear active borders (border-black/50).

grids.dashboard_stats: 2-column bento-style grid for numeric summaries. 1-column for recent orders list to maximize width.
grids.spacing: Use gap-4 or gap-6 generously to prevent accidental mis-taps by workers.

layouts.navigation: Bottom tab bar for Admin (Dashboard, Orders, Users, Settings), simple Stack navigator for Staff assigned tasks.

motion.interactions: Use LayoutAnimation or react-native-reanimated for smooth list transitions. Buttons MUST have visual feedback on press (opacity change or scale down).
motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders for data fetching instead of infinite spinners to reduce cognitive load.

accessibility.touch_targets: MINIMUM 48x48px for all interactive elements. Non-negotiable for godown workers.
accessibility.contrast: Black on White, White on Black. APCA compliant.
accessibility.test_ids: Include testID attribute on all touchables and inputs (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').
accessibility.bilingual: Support mixed Hindi/English text without line-height clipping by using loose leading.

media.logo_guidance: Use a simple monochromatic typographic 'KH' inside overlapping circular lines with 'KISHOR HOSIERY' below.
media.empty_states: Use minimalist grayscale images or simple SVGs to represent empty queues.

3d libraries.usage: None. The application must be highly performant on low-end Android devices used by godown staff.

image_urls.description: Abstract cardboard boxes for empty order lists or no tasks.
Warehouse workers managing inventory. Use with a heavy white overlay (opacity 90%) for the login screen background to provide subtle texture without distraction.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build an Expo React Native app using .js files ONLY (NOT .tsx).
Do NOT use HTML/DOM elements (div, span). Use standard React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList).
For styling, you can use NativeWind if set up, or standard React Native StyleSheet objects mapped to the defined design system.
Ensure all buttons and inputs have a minimum height of 48px to accommodate non-technical Indian godown workers.
Implement a stark, monochromatic Black & White theme to match the Kishor Hosiery brand. Only use colors for status indicators (Red for Alert/Danger, Green for Success/Dispatch, Orange for Pending).
Include a prominent Bell Notification icon with a badge count in the header for real-time alerts.
Design for performance: optimize FlatLists, avoid unnecessary re-renders, and use pure React Native animations.
Do NOT center align all layouts. Use left alignment for data, labels, and lists to ensure natural reading flow.
Ensure the UI handles bilingual text (Hindi/English mix) gracefully without text cut-offs.
Use `testID` (React Native equivalent of data-testid) for all interactive and key informational elements with role-based kebab-case naming.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use high contrast, sharp edges, and purposeful layouts instead of generic soft shadows.
Never use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors instead.
Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for overlapping content like modals, sticky headers, or dropdowns.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'testID' attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Do NOT use AI assistant emojis for icons. Use proper SVG icons from the recommended library.
Provide clear focus/pressed states using activeOpacity on TouchableOpacity or underlayColor on TouchableHighlight. Static interactions feel dead.
Create depth through 1px borders rather than muddy shadows. Embrace the 'Swiss Brutalist' aesthetic.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped or sharp rectangles, aligning with the app's professional and robust feel.
